lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਰਿਦੈ ਵਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jaa kai ridai vasai har naam |2|
lines.english: the Lord's Name abides within his heart. ||2||
he is intuitively in Samaadhi, profound and unfathomable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa mukat taa ke poore kaam |
lines.english: He is liberated forever and all his affairs are perfectly resolved;

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਡੋਲੈ ਕਤ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: aae na jaae ddolai kat naahee |
lines.english: He does not come and go, and he never wavers;
He is totally peaceful, blissful and healthy;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਬਸੈ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jaa kai naam basai man maahee |3|
lines.english: the Naam abides in his mind. ||3||
he looks upon all impartially, and is perfectly detached.
The Guru has blessed Nanak with the Naam;
God is Merciful to the meek; He is the Lord of the World, the Lord of the Universe.
The Gurmukh meditates on Him, and his worries are gone.
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
Sing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, and the Beej Mantra, the Seed Mantra.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਨ ਕੀ ਟਹਲ ਸੰਤ ਕਾ ਕਾਮੁ ॥੪॥੧੫॥੨੬॥
lines.translit: santan kee ttehal sant kaa kaam |4|15|26|
lines.english: he serves the Saints, and works for the Saints. ||4||15||26||
you have slept for so many incarnations - wake up! ||1||
Fall at the feet of the Perfect Guru;
Even the homeless find a home in the world hereafter.
Chant the Chant of the Lord's Name, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਾਸੈ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਰਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te hiradai vaasai bhaujal paar paralaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, it shall be enshrined within your heart, and you shall cross over the terrifying world-ocean. ||1||Pause||
Meditate on the eternal treasure of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, O mind,
and then, the screen of Maya shall be torn away.
and then your soul shall be rendered immaculate and pure. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad amrit ras peeo |
lines.english: Drink in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Guru's Shabad,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਭਜਨੁ ਸਾਧ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: so har bhajan saadh kai sang |
lines.english: So vibrate, and meditate on that Lord in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy;
that without devotional worship of the Lord, no one is saved.
Searching, searching, searching, I have realized
Renounce all your cleverness and trickery.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਵੈ ਜਾਇ ਨ ਕਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: man bin har naavai jaae na kaaee |
lines.english: O mind, without the Lord's Name, there is no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਰਾਪੈ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: man tan raapai har kai rang |3|
lines.english: your mind and body shall be imbued with love for the Lord. ||3||
Nanak seeks the protection and support of the Lord, Har, Har. ||4||16||27||
The Lord of the Universe, the Lord of the World, has taken pity on me.
Your egotistical intellect shall be dispelled,
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਮ ਰੰਗ ਕੇਲ ॥
lines.translit: sant kai sang raam rang kel |
lines.english: In the Saints' Congregation, play joyfully with the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਗੈ ਜਮ ਸਿਉ ਹੋਇ ਨ ਮੇਲ ॥
lines.translit: aagai jam siau hoe na mel |
lines.english: and you will not have to meet the Messenger of Death hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਕਾਂਡ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਨ ਕਾਜੈ ਕੁਸਲ ਸੇਤੀ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਹਿ ਪੰਡਿਤ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karam kaandd ahankaar na kaajai kusal setee ghar jaeh panddit |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Religious rituals and egotism are of no use at all. You shall go home with happiness, O Pandit. ||1||Pause||
and your evil-mindedness will be totally taken away. ||1||
Sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord's Name, O Pandit.
All my hopes have been fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਜਸੁ ਨਿਧਿ ਲੀਆ ਲਾਭ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa jas nidh leea laabh |
lines.english: I have earned the profit, the wealth of the Lord's praise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਨਾਠਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dukh naatthaa sukh ghar meh aaeaa |
lines.english: Pain has left me, and peace has come to my home.
One who is blessed with the gift of the jewel of the Name,
By the Grace of the Saints, my heart-lotus blossoms forth. ||2||
His mind becomes content, finding the Perfect Lord.
Why should he ever go begging again? ||3||
obtains all treasures.
Chanting it with his tongue, he finds the way to salvation.
Hearing the Lord's sermon, he becomes pure and holy.
He alone is approved, who enshrines the Lord within his heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਹੁ ਕਰਿ ਪਕਰੀ ਨ ਆਈ ਹਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: gahu kar pakaree na aaee haath |
lines.english: No matter how hard you try to grab it, it does not come into your hands.
Nanak: such a humble being is exalted, O Siblings of Destiny. ||4||17||28||
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
then it comes and falls at your feet. ||1||
No matter how much you may love it, it does not go along with you.
Says Nanak, when you abandon it,

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਗਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਕਾਈ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਭੇਟਤ ਉਧਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam bin gat nahee kaaee gur pooraa bhettat udhaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Lord's Name, there is no salvation. Meeting with the Perfect Guru, one is saved. ||1||Pause||
Listen, O Saints: this is the pure philosophy.
